emitterParams.note: SPIR-V realization mirrors webgpu-generic: the GPU compute residency for this kernel is pe_replicated within a workgroup with host-copied bindings. The TSIR path for this target is nominal under Move 2 of the re-scoped plan; real-kernel SPIR-V bodies are deferred to a future Vulkan compute-pipeline emitter. This entry exists so the lowering identity is pairwise-complete across (kernelRef, backend = spir-v), not because Doe emits SPIR-V bodies for real-kernel runs. Parity gating for this row is reference=doppler-reference-transcript, backend=spir-v deferred. See docs/tsir-lowering-plan.md Step 8 'Backend lane rules under the re-scope'.
